message:
fix(engine): make SnellEnvelope and tail-latency report construction fallible for edge cases

- optimal_stopping: return InvalidConfig error when payoffs_millionths
  has zero length instead of proceeding with an empty backward-induction
  loop that would produce a silently-wrong envelope
- tail_latency_control_plane: replace .expect() panic on missing
  ExecutionQuantum envelope with ok_or_else returning a
  PolicyValidation error, so callers get a recoverable Result instead
  of a process abort in production

Both changes convert infallible panics into proper error propagation,
improving resilience in deployment scenarios where input data may be
incomplete or upstream pipeline stages may have been skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
